channel.title: Venkatesh Akula's Blog
channel.description: Writing on quantitative research, competitive programming, multi-agent systems, and ML engineering.

item.title: Why I Chose Quantitative Research Over Software Engineering
item.description: On choosing quantitative research at Squarepoint Capital over software engineering — why mathematics, markets, and rigorous problem-solving drew me in.

item.title: Competitive Programming as Mathematical Training
item.description: How competitive programming and contest mathematics develop the rapid pattern recognition skills essential for quantitative research.

item.title: Building Efficient Multi-Agent Systems: Lessons from Adobe Research
item.description: Technical lessons from optimizing multi-agent LLM workflows at Adobe Research.

item.title: The ML Systems Stack: From Data Pipelines to Inference
item.description: An opinionated overview of the end-to-end ML systems stack.
